title: Set date range in Gantt view and print
excerpt:
Hi,

posts.author: mub_aety (mub@aety.io)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We collaborate with a client that has a need for exporting and printing Gantt widgets as part of an executive reporting process. However when the current print is exported it always shows a blank space starting from 2022, even though there is no data in the range 2022 - 2024.

It should be possible to set and apply a data range in the Gantt view that is respected in the view and in the print, no matter when the different timeline bars start and end in the Gantt.

I have already had a lengthy discussion with the Monday support, that states that the current behaviour is a: After thoroughly reviewing the materials you provided, we’ve confirmed that the current behavior you’re seeing — where the Gantt chart starts displaying from 2022 despite no data in earlier years — is expected based on how the widget currently handles its date range for export and printing.
